Maxima Zeilberger telescoper + certificate for S_20(n)=sum_k C(n,k)^4 C(n+k,k)
==============================================================================
Computed on SageMath (GCP Cloud Build, project agora-autoresearch-001).
Format: [[certificate R(n,k)], [telescoper coeffs Q_0..Q_4 of a(n+j)]]
Verified: this order-4 telescoper annihilates S_20(n) for all tested n;
Zeilberger's certificate makes this a proof for ALL n.
==============================================================================

[[-((k^5*(n+1)^3*(62284586971*n^21-463664663403*k*n^20+3520382592934*n^20+1573588465265*k^2*n^19-24658518666558*k*n^19+94241633613450*n^19-3139358281542*k^3*n^18+78398079979810*k^2*n^18-619371546142257*k*n^18+1589076577065242*n^18+4015866389926*k^4*n^17-145830124182528*k^3*n^17+1839020653606009*k^2*n^17-9768746513551319*k*n^17+18931991533353440*n^17-3381932719959*k^5*n^16+173005483269153*k^4*n^16-3178413737398635*k^3*n^16+26994351741867307*k^2*n^16-108489210215222397*k*n^16+169447378769326575*n^16+1840207810013*k^6*n^15-134243883521282*k^5*n^15+3483284957271002*k^4*n^15-43181530296250988*k^3*n^15+277940696202381906*k^2*n^15-901702665935444180*k*n^15+1182589987545742203*n^15-587815590838*k^7*n^14+66682368199136*k^6*n^14-2479052858578888*k^5*n^14+43523910604947977*k^4*n^14-409727950636482376*k^3*n^14+2132518410116135818*k^2*n^14-5818926107038827992*k*n^14+6592927779353797789*n^14+68472928146*k^8*n^13-19073797212016*k^7*n^13+1117766258464863*k^6*n^13-28264591347496278*k^5*n^13+377933318669390253*k^4*n^13-2882896054172377984*k^3*n^13+12642347260567514761*k^2*n^13-29851676798095751208*k*n^13+29835686379855436786*n^13+19870976904*k^9*n^12+1756000356398*k^8*n^12-283773104945868*k^7*n^12+11493241258148173*k^6*n^12-222634740342002346*k^5*n^12+2419787737752220093*k^4*n^12-15586058322199178394*k^3*n^12+59252659401863198435*k^2*n^12-123628197410437821305*k*n^12+110757491694694546441*n^12-8484429142*k^10*n^11+660888639282*k^9*n^11+19349806022022*k^8*n^11-2562765225225128*k^7*n^11+81037746867743852*k^6*n^11-1284344447570772454*k^5*n^11+11827249203783828935*k^4*n^11-66191903124035150280*k^3*n^11+222765628177630649237*k^2*n^11-417343864394046296630*k*n^11+339433352951571203899*n^11+1177918734*k^11*n^10-235850277180*k^10*n^10+9881711790508*k^9*n^10+114969915521747*k^8*n^10-15673497109965050*k^7*n^10+414859255926638814*k^6*n^10-5611797352344115118*k^5*n^10+45067179310235042744*k^4*n^10-223817152742048722790*k^3*n^10+677640406830647444778*k^2*n^10-1154541426397292979119*k*n^10+861322417164667275293*n^10-76820787*k^12*n^9+29856830198*k^11*n^9-2962814325414*k^10*n^9+88043485189693*k^9*n^9+346221063621036*k^8*n^9-68548069222815100*k^7*n^9+1592224483848751457*k^6*n^9-18939725894536120513*k^5*n^9+135511388991376292698*k^4*n^9-606970945108141136012*k^3*n^9+1674519393341053321824*k^2*n^9-2621607873141206238037*k*n^9+1809481292068039798959*n^9-1755689283*k^12*n^8+338166857350*k^11*n^8-22197937957652*k^10*n^8+521511785434651*k^9*n^8-8307508628747*k^8*n^8-220572712988584056*k^7*n^8+4662778223628916463*k^6*n^8-49885445826476696296*k^5*n^8+323313173800171390912*k^4*n^8-1323093926930928493019*k^3*n^8+3360933688040530296384*k^2*n^8-4876989318579193558707*k*n^8+3137104301078673322278*n^8-17676003866*k^12*n^7+2253122583898*k^11*n^7-110184799393542*k^10*n^7+2166363659876208*k^9*n^7-4798748865414684*k^8*n^7-528815192093112450*k^7*n^7+10498678459353751341*k^6*n^7-102856686755884122806*k^5*n^7+611960801850294007763*k^4*n^7-2312412576121962954076*k^3*n^7+5455799333737647498942*k^2*n^7-7391596250800704575732*k*n^7+4458834657163218209252*n^7-102840920676*k^12*n^6+9776144073118*k^11*n^6-380376340347948*k^10*n^6+6477697538833210*k^9*n^6-22625290751825527*k^8*n^6-944961779168243984*k^7*n^6+18163307903633503044*k^6*n^6-165420612559927590560*k^5*n^6+913533927443590749335*k^4*n^6-3215830020204561422980*k^3*n^6+7099300242092877071788*k^2*n^6-9036742802670208010836*k*n^6+5140002840706753704360*n^6-380843824361*k^12*n^5+28852595133130*k^11*n^5-931626883880506*k^10*n^5+14058768594489217*k^9*n^5-59673654430470826*k^8*n^5-1243994240334656096*k^7*n^5+23930119576282630514*k^6*n^5-205275903992232645455*k^5*n^5+1062189744444990740171*k^4*n^5-3509826389388807699844*k^3*n^5+7296254770676409825416*k^2*n^5-8773821473266468408304*k*n^5+4728097716411401417088*n^5-930355365657*k^12*n^4+58632846195690*k^11*n^4-1618350831382908*k^10*n^4+21993472352705875*k^9*n^4-102914817794331831*k^8*n^4-1174550573829094216*k^7*n^4+23557877435877415354*k^6*n^4-192631840796976416909*k^5*n^4+941625261095370656002*k^4*n^4-2939885036530271573832*k^3*n^4+5786933341758975654704*k^2*n^4-6605736841523425806048*k*n^4+3386961092314753342912*n^4-1498183169834*k^12*n^3+80970326039062*k^11*n^3-1953351888721956*k^10*n^3+24197768111766160*k^9*n^3-118946276951233758*k^8*n^3-755980436819596602*k^7*n^3+16756537364930521464*k^6*n^3-132109780831049812268*k^5*n^3+614520121233879704340*k^4*n^3-1823347473909402051616*k^3*n^3+3415237998594100535680*k^2*n^3-3716519772767024292480*k*n^3+1819987741139053051136*n^3-1532334754304*k^12*n^2+72680936270948*k^11*n^2-1559577249273992*k^10*n^2+17779340666288292*k^9*n^2-89332427237207240*k^8*n^2-300476524065534388*k^7*n^2+8119117645442220296*k^6*n^2-62427866796113862644*k^5*n^2+278168733438006236104*k^4*n^2-788431439110533679072*k^3*n^2+1411392856137309193856*k^2*n^2-1469844478632275600896*k*n^2+689819916087255755776*n^2-902456262112*k^12*n+38267821420752*k^11*n-740978962731040*k^10*n+7835125513752080*k^9*n-39573598405789216*k^8*n-58481439298241488*k^7*n+2392098764111461856*k^6*n-18154642393666650064*k^5*n+77968703077421248832*k^4*n-212091078363359172672*k^3*n+364289972159234823680*k^2*n-364318633414088067072*k*n+164372446489352810496*n-232942501120*k^12+8968286293120*k^11-158633843262720*k^10+1566459821584000*k^9-7869341113442560*k^8-1863691269732480*k^7+322289268573775360*k^6-2446805441191926400*k^5+10187776913274558720*k^4-26710298195038981120*k^3+44176748913221632000*k^2-42560148444677406720*k+18512543865488670720))/((n-k+1)^4*(n-k+2)^4*(n-k+3)^4*(n-k+4)^4)),[-(3*(n+1)^4*(3*n+4)*(3*n+5)*(8535643*n^7+169469658*n^6+1436623360*n^5+6740299644*n^4+18902585197*n^3+31686619162*n^2+29399194280*n+11647125056)),-(55063432993*n^13+1588819660695*n^12+20963891132894*n^11+167468366956203*n^10+903613284556839*n^9+3477557072410390*n^8+9820711443781882*n^7+20606199948403839*n^6+32126707298278818*n^5+36761444179589385*n^4+30012007177436894*n^3+16556660879488928*n^2+5532868382941920*n+846052269753600),-(6819978757*n^13+210426023069*n^12+2975530787671*n^11+25526125026989*n^10+148183325103510*n^9+614551146955742*n^8+1872743330919213*n^7+4244605360330637*n^6+7153495812783439*n^5+8851419391630559*n^4+7814133099256906*n^3+4659741954049164*n^2+1681997842192584*n+277519882765920),-((n+3)^2*(179248503*n^11+4813602339*n^10+57994210309*n^9+413646681628*n^8+1940244739916*n^7+6283318000170*n^6+14334249392454*n^5+23036916744307*n^4+25562518558626*n^3+18654645293596*n^2+8059295555832*n+1561898457120)),(n+3)^2*(n+4)^4*(8535643*n^7+109720157*n^6+599053915*n^5+1800480209*n^4+3216974566*n^3+3417224202*n^2+1998561324*n+496575040)]]]
